comment:knob: Knob CW/CCW actions. 'tune_cw'/'tune_ccw' are built-in; or use any TCI command string.
comment:tune_step_hz: Initial step size in Hz used by the built-in tune_cw/tune_ccw actions. The daemon will automatically adopt the step size used by AetherSDR's RX Controls after the first frequency change (scroll or click-tune) — so this value only applies from startup until that first sync. Set it to your most-used step to avoid any mismatch at startup.
comment:buttons: 10 assignable inputs: btn1..btn8 (the labeled ring), left (the side button), knob (knob press).
comment:actions: Each entry is either a TCI command string (e.g. 'trx:0,true;') or a built-in keyword.
comment:builtins: tune_up      — step VFO up by tune_step_hz
tune_down    — step VFO down by tune_step_hz
band_up      — cycle to next higher band
band_down    — cycle to next lower band
ptt_on       — key transmitter (use with press, pair ptt_off with release)
